creator: pru13allan@telia.com
text:
The problem with the hang is only related to when I want to have the USB-disk
checked at boot (/etc/fstab -> fs_passno = 2).

If I set fs_passno = 0 it works without any problems.
It gets mounted automatcally with the info from /etc/fstab.

I don't get the filesystem checked before mounting though.
